source_name: Code4rena Kinetiq Findings and Analysis Report (2025-04) - Low Risk and Non-Critical Issues
why_it_looked_bad: The function iterates over the authorizedOracles array without an upper bound, risking high gas costs or transaction failures if the list grows excessively large.
why_not_valid: unbounded oracle iteration is primarily gas/availability hygiene unless oracle set growth can be attacker-controlled and blocks critical updates
downgrade_reason: unbounded oracle iteration is primarily gas/availability hygiene unless oracle set growth can be attacker-controlled and blocks critical updates
trust_assumption: Treat as a caution/false-positive reference unless the current target shows permissionless reachability, direct value loss, and concrete affected code path.
when_it_could_be_real: if combined with permissionless access, stale oracle data, or large unbounded sets
if protocol configuration makes this path critical to solvency or withdrawal availability
